name: Asolytics
description: Asolytics — ASO platform for keyword research and monitoring with Meta Editor for metadata optimization, launched by Netpeak Group/Tonti Laguna team to help apps reach top store rankings.

seo.title: Asolytics — App Growth Tooling (ASO)
seo.meta_description: Asolytics: Asolytics — ASO platform for keyword research and monitoring with Meta Editor for metadata optimization, launched by Netpeak Group/Tonti Laguna team

when_to_use: Keyword gap analysis using Meta Editor for metadata optimization
Tracking keyword rank movements after ASO updates on App Store
Competitor keyword research for identifying high-traffic low-competition terms
Automated rank monitoring alerts for iOS and Android apps

pros: Backed by experienced Netpeak/Tonti Laguna team
Meta Editor speeds up metadata optimization
Focused ASO workflow, not UA bloat
cons: Brand awareness lower than leading suites
Keyword database smaller than top competitors
Few native integrations with UA platforms
Pricing less transparent for small teams
review.verdict: Competent ASO tool from a known agency parent, strong in metadata tooling but not a market leader.
review.best_for: Teams that want a focused ASO workflow with good metadata editing
review.not_for: Marketers needing broad market or creative intelligence

lock_in.reason: SaaS ASO data, exportable reports but vendor tooling
